meaning: generally recognized as safe(饮料等)一般认为安全(美国食品及药物管理局用语)
examples: Production of the foie gras pt involves force-feeding geese and ducks so that their livers swell.
Mole groaned dolorously: "no butter, no—no pate de foie gras, no champagne!"
Hit up Mardi Gras in New Orleans.
Theirs comes with duck confit, caramelised balsamic onions and a foie gras and red wine sauce.
Four people were hurt in a February Mardi Gras attack, the New Orleans Times-Picayune reported.
